sentences.target: Ich habe seit gestern schlimmen Husten.

translations.de: Ich habe seit gestern schlimmen Husten.
translations.en: I've had a bad cough since yesterday.
translations.es: Desde ayer tengo una tos fuerte.
translations.fr: J'ai une forte toux depuis hier.
translations.it: Ho una brutta tosse da ieri.
translations.zh-Hans: 我从昨天开始咳嗽得很厉害。
translations.yue: 我由尋日開始咳得好勁。
translations.ru: С вчерашнего дня у меня сильный кашель.
translations.pt: Estou com uma tosse forte desde ontem.
translations.he: מאז אתמול יש לי שיעול חזק.
translations.tr: Dünden beri şiddetli bir öksürüğüm var.
translations.vi: Tôi bị ho nặng từ hôm qua.
translations.nl: Sinds gisteren heb ik een erge hoest.
translations.uk: Від учора в мене сильний кашель.
translations.hi: मुझे कल से तेज खांसी है.
translations.nb: Jeg har hatt kraftig hoste siden i går.
translations.sv: Jag har haft kraftig hosta sedan igår.
translations.ro: De ieri am o tuse puternică.
translations.da: Jeg har haft slem hoste siden i går.
translations.fi: Minulla on ollut kova yskä eilisestä lähtien.
translations.ja: 昨日からひどい咳が出ています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of the finite verb.
Finite lexical verb, 1st person singular present indicative; takes the direct object 'Husten' and a temporal adjunct.
Temporal preposition 'since' introducing a time reference; here combined with the adverb 'gestern' to form a temporal PP.
Temporal adverb 'yesterday'; complement to 'seit' specifying the starting point in time.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Husten'; strong declension, masculine accusative singular (no article present).
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular as direct object of 'habe'.

sentences.target: Der Arzt verschreibt mir etwas gegen Husten.
sentences.reading: /deːɐ̯ aːɐ̯t͡st fɛɐ̯ˈʃʁaɪ̯pt miːɐ̯ ˈɛtvas ˈɡeːɡn̩ ˈhuːstn̩/

translations.de: Der Arzt verschreibt mir etwas gegen Husten.
translations.ipa: /deːɐ̯ aːɐ̯t͡st fɛɐ̯ˈʃʁaɪ̯pt miːɐ̯ ˈɛtvas ˈɡeːɡn̩ ˈhuːstn̩/
translations.en: The doctor prescribes me something for my cough.
translations.es: El médico me receta algo para la tos.
translations.fr: Le médecin me prescrit quelque chose contre la toux.
translations.it: Il medico mi prescrive qualcosa per la tosse.
translations.yue: 醫生開咗啲止咳藥畀我。
translations.ru: Врач выписал мне лекарство от кашля.
translations.pt: O médico me receitou um remédio para a tosse.
translations.tr: Doktor öksürüğüm için bir ilaç yazdı.
translations.vi: Bác sĩ kê cho tôi thuốc ho.
translations.nl: De dokter schrijft me iets voor tegen de hoest.
translations.uk: Лікар виписав мені ліки від кашлю.
translations.hu: Az orvos felírt egy gyógyszert köhögésre.
translations.hi: डॉक्टर ने मेरी खांसी के लिए दवा लिख दी.
translations.pl: Lekarz przepisał mi coś na kaszel.
translations.el: Ο γιατρός μου έγραψε φάρμακο για τον βήχα.
translations.nb: Legen skrev ut noe mot hosten.
translations.id: Dokter meresepkan obat untuk batuk saya.
translations.sv: Läkaren skriver ut något mot hostan.
translations.ro: Medicul mi-a prescris ceva pentru tuse.
translations.cs: Doktor mi předepsal něco na kašel.
translations.ja: 医者が咳に効く薬を処方してくれた。

tokens.explanation: Definite article; nominative masculine singular determiner for 'Arzt' (subject NP).
Common noun, masculine; nominative singular as subject of 'verschreibt'.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; takes an indirect object 'mir' (DAT), a direct object 'etwas' (ACC), and a PP 'gegen Husten' indicating purpose.
Personal pronoun; dative 1st person singular functioning as indirect object/recipient.
Indefinite pronoun functioning as the direct object (accusative) of 'verschreibt'.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a PP specifying purpose ('against' a condition).
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular as the object of the preposition 'gegen'.

sentences.target: Mein Kind hat nachts starken Husten.

translations.de: Mein Kind hat nachts starken Husten.
translations.en: My child has a bad cough at night.
translations.es: Por la noche mi hijo tose mucho.
translations.fr: Mon enfant tousse beaucoup la nuit.
translations.it: Di notte mio figlio tossisce molto.
translations.zh-Hans: 我家孩子晚上咳得很厉害。
translations.yue: 我個小朋友夜晚咳得好勁。
translations.pt: Meu filho tosse muito à noite.
translations.vi: Con tôi ho nặng vào ban đêm.
translations.hi: मेरे बच्चे को रात में तेज खांसी होती है.
translations.pl: Moje dziecko w nocy mocno kaszle.
translations.el: Το παιδί μου βήχει πολύ τη νύχτα.
translations.nb: Barnet mitt hoster mye om natten.
translations.id: Anak saya batuk parah pada malam hari.
translations.sv: Mitt barn hostar mycket på natten.
translations.cs: Moje dítě v noci hodně kašle.
translations.da: Mit barn hoster meget om natten.
translations.ja: うちの子は夜にひどく咳をします。

tokens.explanation: Possessive determiner; nominative neuter singular modifying 'Kind' (subject NP).
Common noun, neuter; nominative singular subject of 'hat'.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; takes direct object 'Husten' and is modified by the temporal adverb 'nachts'.
Temporal adverb indicating when the action occurs; modifies the verb phrase.
Attributive adjective modifying 'Husten'; strong declension, masculine accusative singular.
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular as direct object of 'hat'.

sentences.target: Im Bus bekomme ich plötzlich Husten.

translations.de: Im Bus bekomme ich plötzlich Husten.
translations.en: On the bus I suddenly get a cough.
translations.es: De repente me da tos en el autobús.
translations.fr: Dans le bus, je me mets soudain à tousser.
translations.it: In autobus mi viene all'improvviso la tosse.
translations.zh-Hans: 在公交车上我突然咳嗽了。
translations.ru: В автобусе я вдруг начинаю кашлять.
translations.pt: No ônibus, de repente, começo a tossir.
translations.vi: Trên xe buýt tôi bỗng ho.
translations.nl: In de bus begin ik ineens te hoesten.
translations.uk: В автобусі я раптом починаю кашляти.
translations.hi: बस में अचानक मुझे खांसी आ जाती है.
translations.el: Στο λεωφορείο ξαφνικά αρχίζω να βήχω.
translations.nb: På bussen begynner jeg plutselig å hoste.
translations.id: Di bus saya tiba-tiba mulai batuk.
translations.sv: På bussen börjar jag plötsligt hosta.
translations.ro: În autobuz încep brusc să tușesc.
translations.da: I bussen begynder jeg pludselig at hoste.
translations.ja: バスの中で急に咳が出ます。

tokens.explanation: Fused form of 'in' + 'dem' (in the); preposition marking static location and introducing a dative NP ('Bus').
Common noun, masculine; dative singular as the object of the preposition 'im' indicating location.
Finite verb, 1st person singular present indicative; takes 'ich' as subject and 'Husten' as direct object; modified by 'plötzlich'.
Personal pronoun, 1st person singular nominative; subject of 'bekomme' (in post-verbal position due to V2 word order).
Adverb of manner/time modifying the verb phrase; indicates abrupt onset.
Common noun, masculine; accusative singular as direct object of 'bekomme'.

es: Desde ayer tengo una tos fuerte.
El médico me receta algo para la tos.
Por la noche mi hijo tose mucho.
De repente me da tos en el autobús.

Le médecin me prescrit quelque chose contre la toux.
Mon enfant tousse beaucoup la nuit.
Dans le bus, je me mets soudain à tousser.

Il medico mi prescrive qualcosa per la tosse.
Di notte mio figlio tossisce molto.
In autobus mi viene all'improvviso la tosse.
